summary: Comprehensive testing of NEW Project Detail page feature - All backend tests (9/9) passed, all frontend features working correctly (100% pass rate)
critical_code_review_comments: Code quality is excellent - proper use of React hooks (useState, useEffect, useCallback)
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
Lightbox properly prevents body scroll when open and handles keyboard navigation
Request Quote dialog properly submits to /api/public/contact endpoint with project context
Related projects correctly filtered by same category and excludes current project
Backend properly handles invalid ObjectId format with 400 error and non-existent projects with 404
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - existing projects have been enriched with gallery_images, location, area, completion_date, highlights, scope fields
context_for_next_testing_agent: Project Detail page fully tested at /projects/:projectId. All features working: hero image, title, category badge, quick info bar (Client, Location, Area, Completed), Project Scope section, Key Highlights section with numbered items, Project Gallery with lightbox, Request Quote dialog with form submission to /api/public/contact, sidebar CTA and project info card, Related Projects section, Back to Gallery link, bottom CTA section. Gallery page cards now navigate to detail pages on click while lightbox button still works separately.

backend_api: ✓ GET /api/public/projects/{id} - returns project with all fields
✓ GET /api/public/projects/{id} - returns new fields (gallery_images, location, area, completion_date, highlights, scope)
✓ GET /api/public/projects/{id} - returns related_projects from same category
✓ GET /api/public/projects/{id} - returns 400 for invalid ObjectId format
✓ Manufacturing Facilities project has complete data (2 gallery images, 5 highlights)
✓ POST /api/admin/projects - create project with all new fields
✓ PUT /api/admin/projects/{id} - update project with new fields
✓ POST /api/public/contact - submit quote request for a project
frontend_project_detail_page: ✓ Page loads at /projects/{projectId} with hero image, title, description, category badge
✓ Quick info bar shows Client, Location, Area, Completed date
✓ Project Scope section renders with full text
✓ Key Highlights section renders with numbered items
✓ Project Gallery section shows main image + gallery_images (3 total)
✓ Gallery images clickable with lightbox opening
✓ Lightbox has navigation arrows and image counter
✓ Request Quote button opens dialog with form (name, email, phone, message)
✓ Request Quote form submits successfully to /api/public/contact endpoint
✓ Success toast shown after quote submission
✓ Sidebar shows CTA card and project details card
✓ Related Projects section shows 1 project from same category (Industrial)
✓ Back to Gallery link navigates to /projects
✓ Bottom CTA section has Request Quote and Contact Us buttons
frontend_gallery_page_updates: ✓ Gallery page project cards navigate to /projects/{id} on click
✓ Gallery page still has lightbox button (magnify icon) on hover
✓ Lightbox button opens lightbox without navigating to detail page
